category_sources: source_facts.description describes px as ps and top for human beings, indicating a process inspection tool.

docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; the official README documents px and ptop usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
